title: Aeschynanthus nummularius
taxonomy: Aeschynanthus nummularius is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Aeschynanthus nummularius belonging to the subfamily Gesneroideae. As a member of the Gesneriaceae family, Aeschynanthus nummularius shares similarities with other plants in this family, including the African violet.
